new_translation: Máy bay được trang bị các hệ thống điều hướng tiên tiến hôm nay.

old_example: Ms. Nayar is a highly respected economist who will be delivering the keynote address at the international trade forum.
new_example: Ms. Nayar will deliver the keynote address at the forum today.
new_translation: Bà Nayar sẽ có bài phát biểu chính tại diễn đàn hôm nay.

old_example: The company's new regional headquarters is located near the city center international business district area recently recently recently recently.
new_example: The new regional headquarters is located near the city center today.
new_translation: Trụ sở khu vực mới của công ty nằm gần trung tâm thành phố.

old_example: The team managed to find a high-quality international restaurant nearby to celebrate their successful marketing project launch yesterday afternoon recently recently.
new_example: The team found a high-quality restaurant nearby to celebrate today.
new_translation: Cả nhóm đã tìm được một nhà hàng chất lượng gần đó hôm nay.

old_example: The project is nearing its final phase, with the official launch scheduled for early next month.
new_example: The project is nearing its final phase today.
new_translation: Dự án đang tiến gần đến giai đoạn cuối cùng hôm nay.

old_example: The main advantage of the hotel is its nearness to the city's main tourist attractions and public transportation hubs.
new_example: The main advantage of the hotel is its nearness to attractions today.
new_translation: Lợi thế của khách sạn là sự gần gũi với các điểm tham quan.

old_example: Please remember to keep your office desk neat and professional before you leave the building early every Friday afternoon recently recently recently.
new_example: Please remember to keep your office desk neat and professional today.
new_translation: Vui lòng nhớ giữ bàn làm việc gọn gàng và chuyên nghiệp hôm nay.

old_example: The administrative assistant organized all the international business documents and invoices neatly in the professional leather briefcase yesterday afternoon recently recently.
new_example: The assistant organized all the documents and invoices neatly today.
new_translation: Trợ lý đã sắp xếp gọn gàng tất cả tài liệu và hóa đơn hôm nay.

old_example: A higher price does not necessarily mean that the product is of superior quality compared to its competitors.
new_example: A higher price does not necessarily mean superior quality today.
new_translation: Mức giá cao hơn không nhất thiết có nghĩa chất lượng tốt hơn.
